# N Joinery - njoinery.co.uk

> Specialists in high-end architectural joinery and bespoke fitted furniture.

## Pages

- [Home](https://njoinery.co.uk/): Landing page with hero, services overview, and featured projects.
- [Portfolio](https://njoinery.co.uk/portfolio.html): Curated showcase of seven bespoke joinery commissions.
- [About](https://njoinery.co.uk/about.html): Our story, process, and values.
- [Contact](https://njoinery.co.uk/contact.html): Get in touch for a commission.

## Projects

- [The Walnut Residence - Walnut Kitchen & Dining](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-walnut-kitchen.html): Full walnut kitchen-diner with coffered ceiling, brass fittings, and onyx stone backsplash.
- [The Saffron Living Room - Oak Cabinetry & AV Suite](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-oak-cabinetry.html): Custom-fitted bookshelf, AV unit, and cabinetry with integrated window seat.
- [Accoya Doors - Church Doors](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-church-doors.html): Ecclesiastical doors in Accoya timber with blue stained glass crosses.
- [The Regent's Park Retreat - Bespoke Sauna](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-sauna.html): Custom-fitted sauna in a luxury London residence.
- [The Compass Rose - Ipê Hardwood Inlay](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-flooring-inlay.html): Bespoke flooring with compass rose inlays in Ipê hardwood.
- [The Art Deco Mantle - Ipê Sunburst](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-sunburst-mantle.html): Ipê hardwood mantelpiece with Art Deco radiating geometry.
- [Fitted Furniture - Bespoke Cabinetry & Storage](https://njoinery.co.uk/project-fitted-furniture.html): Bespoke fitted furniture and custom cabinetry designed to maximise space.

## Services

- Bespoke Kitchens
- Fitted Furniture & Cabinetry
- Architectural Joinery
- Ecclesiastical Woodwork
- Specialist Timber Inlay
- Custom Sauna Builds
- Custom Cabinetry

## Location

United Kingdom - serving Bristol, London, Essex, and nationwide.
